---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that the project does not support today?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see? If it touches A2A or MCP behavior, describe how.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Links, references to the A2A / MCP specs, or examples.
